query: SELECT s.spaceId FROM suppliers_with_space s LEFT JOIN supplier_spaces ss ON s.spaceId = ss.id WHERE ss.id IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user r9CVoJ25nh9Ssfd.root --database Ztp8T7Vpr2FQpGULvKFpsw --execute SELECT s.spaceId FROM suppliers_with_space s LEFT JOIN supplier_spaces ss ON s.spaceId = ss.id WHERE ss.id IS NULL;
